concerns.text: FR-031b requires 'Ground truth MUST be established by human annotation independent of the pipeline' but the Methodological Limitations section explicitly acknowledges this is impossible without access to raw data. Annotators can only verify internal consistency (which the pipeline already does), not whether reported numbers match actual experimental data. This makes the ground truth unverifiable.

SC-031b requires precision ≥ 85% and recall ≥ 75% on real-world validation, but the ground truth methodology (human annotation of reported numbers) cannot independently verify whether reported statistics match actual experimental data. The success criterion cannot be measured if ground truth cannot be established.
